positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration of a mystical, glowing geometric forest grove. Clean silhouettes of stylized flora and towering architectural root systems interlace under a deep indigo sky. Bioluminescent accents of emerald green and sapphire blue spill from hidden sources, contrasted by striking gold foil-like linework. Central composition, highly detailed line art, clean vector illustration style, dramatic cinematic lighting, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, malformed hands, bad anatomy, low contrast, overexposed, washed out, photorealism
